title: Sika India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sika India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Sika India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sika India:
Sika India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
